title: stop completion goal achieved program done
purpose: A4.5 defines stop completion goal achieved program done for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified.
scope: Owns `A4.5` only; siblings under `A4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §3 — Branch A — Pursuit & control plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#3-branch-a-pursuit-control-plane).
behavior_steps: When `goal_verify_command` passes and H3 accepts (or policy waives H3), pursuit records stop class `completion:achieved`—`goal.state` transitions to achieved with timestamps and evidence pointers per [INTRO-1.3](INTRO-1.3-goal-completion-criterion.md).

Unlike [A2.5](A2.5-goal-verify-pass-transition-h3-pending.md) H3 pending, completion closes pursuit for that goal_id—no further [A2.2](A2.2-if-ready-execute-one-pipeline-step.md) phases run against the same scope unless a new goal opens.
Program manifest complete or company_ops criteria satisfied produce analogous completion stops with roll-up fields for parent goals so dashboards show closure without journal parsing.
Under [A3.3](A3.3-company-autopilot-multi-goal-role-workstreams.md) company autopilot, completion on one goal may immediately advance scheduling to the next ready queued goal when preflight allows.
Premature completion without proof is blocked by [A4.2](A4.2-stop-verify-evidence-goal-verify-regression.md)—goal_verify must pass and H3 must clear before `completion:*` is written.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
goal_verify passes but H3 rejected â€” goal.state returns to pursuing with rejection notes.
Edge case `A4.5` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `A4.5`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Add `goal` block to state template and journal-keeper dual-write (v2.14).
Implement `scripts/goal-verify.py` stub aggregating task evidence paths.
Document `A4.5` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `A4.5`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: A4.5 defines stop completion goal achieved program done for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified. In practice, the system when `goal_verify_command` passes and h3 accepts (or policy waives h3), pursuit records stop class `completion:achieved`—`goal.state` transitions to achieved with timestamps and evidence pointers per [intro-1.3](intro-1.3-goal-completion-criterion.md), then unlike [a2.5](a2.5-goal-verify-pass-transition-h3-pending.md) h3 pending, completion closes pursuit for that goal_id—no further [a2.2](a2.2-if-ready-execute-one-pipeline-step.md) phases run against the same scope unless a new goal opens.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-a 2026-06-28 -->

Completion stops are successful termination: goal_verify passed, H3 accepted (or waived under policy), program manifest complete, or company_ops goal criteria satisfied per [INTRO-1.3](INTRO-1.3-goal-completion-criterion.md). The goal state transitions to achieved or program_done with timestamps and evidence pointers.

Unlike H3-pending ([A2.5](A2.5-goal-verify-pass-transition-h3-pending.md)), this stop closes pursuit for that goal id. Multi-goal company autopilot ([A3.3](A3.3-company-autopilot-multi-goal-role-workstreams.md)) may immediately advance to the next queued goal. Operators should see completion on dashboard/STATUS without parsing journals.
